title: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Discounted cash flow valuation for Verisk Analytics modeling strong free cash flow generation driven by recurring subscription revenue and an entrenched insurance data ecosystem.

revenueGrowth.rationale: An 8.0% growth rate models consistent structural demand for proprietary data analytics, aided by consistent pricing leverage and product expansions into cyber and climate risks.

terminalGrowthRate.rationale: A 3.0% long-term growth rate reflects Verisk's entrenched position, growing slightly faster than GDP due to the increasing complexity of risk pricing.

discountRate.rationale: An 8.0% discount rate reflects Verisk's very low business risk profile, highly predictable revenue base, and robust recurring cash flows.
